search_query: best time to eat around workouts
combined_text: You Asked: Should I Eat Before or After a Workout? Illustration by Peter Oumanski for TIMEBy Markham Heid September 17, 2014TIME Health For more, visit TIME Health. Short answer: Both. Long answer: How and when to fuel your body is the same for all exercisers to some extent, but your routine may warrant a few nutritional tweaks, says Dr. Nancy Cohen
